com.tonic.jaloc.impl.arrays.struct

Class PStructArray<T extends PStruct>

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeArray<PStructWriter<T>>
      • com.tonic.jaloc.impl.arrays.struct.PStructArray<T>
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.AutoCloseable, java.lang.Iterable<T>

    public final class PStructArray<T extends PStruct>
extends AbstractNativeArray<PStructWriter<T>>
implements java.lang.Iterable<T>
    A fixed-length native struct array; fields are read through StructField handles or typed views.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      PStructArray(NativeAllocator allocator, StructViewFactory<T> viewFactory, StructLayout layout, long length)
      Allocates length structs on the given allocator, zeroed.
      PStructArray(StructViewFactory<T> viewFactory, StructLayout layout, long length)
      Allocates length structs on the system allocator, zeroed.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      T at(long index)
      Creates a view of the struct at index.
      void clearRange(long fromIndex, long toIndex)
      Zeroes fromIndex inclusive to toIndex exclusive.
      void clearStruct(long index)
      Zeroes the struct at index.
      void copyStruct(long sourceIndex, long destinationIndex)
      Copies the struct at sourceIndex over the one at destinationIndex.
      void copyStructTo(long sourceIndex, PStructArray<?> destination, long destinationIndex)
      Copies a struct into destination; both arrays must share the same layout instance.
      T cursor() 
      java.util.Iterator<T> cursorIterator()
      Iterates through one reusable view; do not hold it across next() calls.
      boolean getBoolean(long index, StructField field)
      Reads the BOOLEAN field at index.
      byte getByte(long index, StructField field)
      Reads the BYTE field at index.
      char getChar(long index, StructField field)
      Reads the CHAR field at index.
      double getDouble(long index, StructField field)
      Reads the DOUBLE field at index.
      float getFloat(long index, StructField field)
      Reads the FLOAT field at index.
      int getInt(long index, StructField field)
      Reads the INT field at index.
      long getLong(long index, StructField field)
      Reads the LONG field at index.
      short getShort(long index, StructField field)
      Reads the SHORT field at index.
      @NotNull java.util.Iterator<T> iterator() 
      StructLayout layout() 
      void setBoolean(long index, StructField field, boolean value)
      Writes the BOOLEAN field at index.
      void setByte(long index, StructField field, byte value)
      Writes the BYTE field at index.
      void setChar(long index, StructField field, char value)
      Writes the CHAR field at index.
      void setDouble(long index, StructField field, double value)
      Writes the DOUBLE field at index.
      void setFloat(long index, StructField field, float value)
      Writes the FLOAT field at index.
      void setInt(long index, StructField field, int value)
      Writes the INT field at index.
      void setLong(long index, StructField field, long value)
      Writes the LONG field at index.
      void setShort(long index, StructField field, short value)
      Writes the SHORT field at index.
      void sort(java.util.Comparator<? super T> comparator)
      Sorts the whole array by comparator.
      void sort(long fromIndex, long toIndex, java.util.Comparator<? super T> comparator)
      Sorts fromIndex inclusive to toIndex exclusive by comparator.
      long stride() 
      void swapStruct(long firstIndex, long secondIndex)
      Swaps two structs in place.
      PStructWriter<T> writer()

    • Constructor Detail

      • PStructArray

        public PStructArray(StructViewFactory<T> viewFactory,
                    StructLayout layout,
                    long length)
        Allocates length structs on the system allocator, zeroed.
        Parameters:
        viewFactory - creates the typed views
        layout - the struct layout
        length - the element count
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if length is negative

      • PStructArray

        public PStructArray(NativeAllocator allocator,
                    StructViewFactory<T> viewFactory,
                    StructLayout layout,
                    long length)
        Allocates length structs on the given allocator, zeroed.
        Parameters:
        allocator - the allocator to source memory from
        viewFactory - creates the typed views
        layout - the struct layout
        length - the element count
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if length is negative

    • Method Detail

      • layout

        public StructLayout layout()
        Returns:
        the struct layout

      • stride

        public long stride()
        Returns:
        the aligned per-element stride in bytes

      • getBoolean

        public boolean getBoolean(long index,
                          StructField field)
        Reads the BOOLEAN field at index.
        Parameters:
        index - the struct index
        field - the field handle
        Returns:
        the value
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if field is foreign or not BOOLEAN
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if index is out of range
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • setBoolean

        public void setBoolean(long index,
                       StructField field,
                       boolean value)
        Writes the BOOLEAN field at index.

        field - the field handle
        value - the value to store
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if field is foreign or not BOOLEAN
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if index is out of range
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • clearRange

        public void clearRange(long fromIndex,
                       long toIndex)
        Description copied from class: AbstractNativeArray
        Zeroes fromIndex inclusive to toIndex exclusive.
        Specified by:
        clearRange in class AbstractNativeArray<PStructWriter<T extends PStruct>>
        Parameters:
        fromIndex - the range start, inclusive
        toIndex - the range end, exclusive

      • copyStruct

        public void copyStruct(long sourceIndex,
                       long destinationIndex)
        Copies the struct at sourceIndex over the one at destinationIndex.
        Parameters:
        sourceIndex - the source struct
        destinationIndex - the destination struct
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if either index is out of range
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • copyStructTo

        public void copyStructTo(long sourceIndex,
                         PStructArray<?> destination,
                         long destinationIndex)
        Copies a struct into destination; both arrays must share the same layout instance.
        Parameters:
        sourceIndex - the source struct
        destination - the target array
        destinationIndex - the destination struct
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if destination is null
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if the layouts differ
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if either index is out of range
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • swapStruct

        public void swapStruct(long firstIndex,
                       long secondIndex)
        Swaps two structs in place.
        Parameters:
        firstIndex - the first struct
        secondIndex - the second struct
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if either index is out of range
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • sort

        public void sort(java.util.Comparator<? super T> comparator)
        Sorts the whole array by comparator.
        Parameters:
        comparator - the ordering
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if comparator is null
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • sort

        public void sort(long fromIndex,
                 long toIndex,
                 java.util.Comparator<? super T> comparator)
        Sorts fromIndex inclusive to toIndex exclusive by comparator.
        Parameters:
        fromIndex - the range start, inclusive
        toIndex - the range end, exclusive
        comparator - the ordering
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if comparator is null
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if the range is out of bounds
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • writer

        public PStructWriter<T> writer()
        Specified by:
        writer in class AbstractNativeArray<PStructWriter<T extends PStruct>>
        Returns:
        a fresh writer at position zero

      • at

        public T at(long index)
        Creates a view of the struct at index.
        Parameters:
        index - the struct index
        Returns:
        a fresh view
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if index is out of range
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • cursor

        public T cursor()
        Returns:
        a reusable view for moveTo repositioning
